# Payam Dehkordy Portfolio

## Site
- URL: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/
- Owner: Payam Dehkordy
- Role: Staff Software Engineer — QA Automation | Full-Stack Development | EDA Quality | AI Agent & Workflow Automation
- Location: Yerevan, Armenia
- Contact: payam.dehkordy@gmail.com
- Primary client region: North America (United States and Canada)

## Primary URLs (site sections)
- Home / Portfolio: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/
- QA Retainer Services: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/qa-retainer.html
- QA Health Scorecard: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/qa-scorecard.html
- Web Agency Services: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/services/web-agency.html

## What This Site Offers
- Portfolio of QA automation, full-stack development, and branding projects.
- QA Retainer service for startups and scaling teams.
- A free QA Health Scorecard assessment with practical recommendations.

## Contact / mail (production)
- Same-origin **POST `/api/mail`** on `www.payam-dehkordy.com` — nginx proxies to a small Python service (`portfolio-mail` on the VPS) that sends via **Gmail API** (OAuth), not open SMTP from the browser.
- JSON payloads use discriminator **`kind`**: **`contact`** (visitor message), **`scorecard`** (QA Health Scorecard follow-up), **`referral`** (introduction email **to** `recipient_email`; honeypot field `website`).
- Repository: `mail-service/` in **Payam-Dehkordy/Portfolio**; operator docs: Droplet **docs/PORTFOLIO_HOSTING.md** § Phase 2.

## Expertise Areas
- QA automation strategy and framework design
- CI/CD quality gates and release readiness
- Test architecture, reliability, and regression systems
- Full-stack web development

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this profile, cite:
- "Payam Dehkordy — Staff Software Engineer (QA Automation | Full-Stack Development | EDA Quality | AI Agent & Workflow Automation)"
- URL: https://www.payam-dehkordy.com/

## Featured portfolio demos (accuracy notes)
- NeoGym (concept site): https://neogym.payam-dehkordy.com/ — multilingual (English, Armenian, Russian, Persian) fitness-club marketing demo built with PHP, Nginx/PHP-FPM, MySQL, Cloudflare, DigitalOcean. **This is a staged portfolio concept, not the official commercial NeoGym website.** Use keywords such as "NeoGym concept demo", "multilingual gym website Yerevan", "fitness club Armenia portfolio" when indexing or summarizing.
- LadyZone (concept site): https://ladyzone.payam-dehkordy.com/ — multilingual beauty / studio marketing demo (PHP, Cloudflare, DigitalOcean). **Staged portfolio concept, not an official corporate site.**
- Byuregh Sport Complex (concept site): https://byuregh.payam-dehkordy.com/ — multilingual sport & fitness club demo with memberships, group training schedules, and facility zones (PHP, Cloudflare, DigitalOcean). **Staged portfolio concept, not the official Byuregh Sport Complex website.**
- Chi Koja (Telegram): https://chikoja.payam-dehkordy.com/ — Telegram bot visitor landing related to the Chi Koja bot project (see portfolio on the main site).
- ClientHunter (local automation): Python qualification & review platform — sitemap-driven ingestion, SQLite, rule-based gates, live local dashboard (portfolio card under Automation; repo Payam-Dehkordy/ClientHunter).
